slides.title: The foreach Loop
foreach Examples
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$colors = ["red", "green", "blue"];
foreach ($colors as $color) {
    echo "Color: $color\n";
}

$person = ["name" => "Alice", "age" => 25, "city" => "Paris"];
foreach ($person as $key => $value) {
    echo "$key: $value\n";
}
?>

slides.title: Modifying Array Values

quizData.question: Given `$data = ['a'=>1, 'b'=>2];`, how do you loop to print keys and values?
quizData.explanation: The correct syntax for key-value iteration is `foreach ($array as $key => $value)`.
